name: Austin Independent School District
about: Austin Independent School District serves approximately 73,000 students in Austin, the capital city of Texas.
calendarNotes: Austin ISD starts the school year in early August, following the Texas pattern of beginning several weeks ahead of the national average. Spring Break in Austin typically falls in mid-March and coincides with South by Southwest (SXSW), one of the country's largest music, film, and tech festivals — the city is extremely congested during this period, with heavy traffic, limited parking, and crowded restaurants. Families planning local activities during Spring Break should account for festival crowds even if not attending SXSW events. Austin's rapid population growth means school attendance boundaries are frequently redrawn; families who move within the city should reconfirm their assigned school before each school year.
